ab: I pituay ku tuki tayra tu kaku i cacudadan.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: Malingatu tu a micudad! cumudsa ku pasevana’ay, suwal satu ku pangcang, “katemireng! micemek!”
ch: 開始上課了!老師剛走進教室時，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said, “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: Tataang ku nipangiha niyam, “Kapah haw kisu pasevana’ay?”
I nipicudad, pasevana’an nu pasevana’ay kami tu sasausian nu Pangcah a suwal.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的阿美族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Pangcah language of numbers.

ab: Duduen niyam ku pasevana’ay a remadiw tu sapisa’usi a radiw.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: Adihay tu ku nikavana’an nu maku tu suwal nu Pangcah.
en: I have learned many Pangcah languages.

ab: A patengil kaku ci inaan tu nipinanam tu suwal nu Pangcah i cacudadan tu remiremiad.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Pangcah language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
